command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== 1. Deny send_message tool via sed (no yaml module needed) ==="
# Check if tools: block already exists
grep -n "^tools:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml
if grep -q "^tools:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml; then
  echo "tools section exists - check current content"
  grep -A10 "^tools:" /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml
else
  # Insert tools deny block at top of config (before first section)
  sed -i '1i tools:\n  deny:\n    - send_message\n' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml
  echo "tools deny block added"
fi

echo ""
echo "=== 2. Fix channel_directory.json (restore group target) ==="
cat > /home/jose/.hermes/channel_directory.json << 'CHANEOF'
{
  "telegram:group:-1003934415467": {
    "platform": "telegram",
    "chat_id": "-1003934415467",
    "type": "group",
    "title": "DevilDollzllc"
  }
}
CHANEOF
echo "channel directory restored"

echo ""
echo "=== 3. Restart to apply tool deny ==="
sudo systemctl restart hermes-gateway
sleep 10
echo "active: $(systemctl is-active hermes-gateway)"
echo ""
echo "=== 4. Confirm no more send_message in tools + channel directory ==="
tail -8 /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
REMOTE
